zh.lifeSummary: 當William Farrington I於1381年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾法利頓時，他的父親John Farrington26歲，母親Alice Houghton23歲。他於1404年6月20日與Cecily Tunstall在英國英格蘭藍卡爾法利頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1422年在他的家鄉享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: Farrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Farrington in Lancashire, but perhaps occasionally from Farrington Gurney in Somerset. Both are named from Old English fearn ‘fern’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The surname also probably reached America via Ireland, where it is recorded as early as the 14th century.

variants.name: Fearrington
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of   Farrington  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Farrington I was born in 1381, in Farington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Farrington, was 26 and his mother, Alice Houghton, was 23. He married Cecily Tunstall on 20 June 1404, in Farington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1422, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

Il a épousé Cecily Tunstall le 20 juin 1404, à Farington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1422, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Farrington Iが1381年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアファリントンで生まれた時，父John Farringtonは26歳，母Alice Houghtonは23歳であった。1404年6月20日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアファリントンでCecily Tunstallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1422年に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Farrington I(이)가 1381년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 패링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Farrington(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Houghton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1404년 6월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 패링턴에서 Cecily Tunstall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1422년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.
